ddls:
CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "entryid_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the entry ID for the measurement */,
  "actual_height" REAL /* Actual height of the water */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance from the monitoring station */,
  "ph" REAL /* pH level of the water */,
  "turbidity" REAL /* Turbidity level of the water */,
  "reservoirid_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reservoir where the measurement was taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement was taken */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the monitoring station where the measurement was taken */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the water */,
  "dissolved_oxygen" REAL /* Dissolved oxygen level in the water */,
  "conductivity" REAL /* Conductivity of the water */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_reservoirid_id FOREIGN KEY ("reservoirid_id") REFERENCES reservoirs ("reservoirid_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reservoirs" (
  "reservoirid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reservoir */,
  "reservoir_name" TEXT /* Name of the reservoir */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the reservoir */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the reservoir */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Maximum capacity of the reservoir */,
  "current_level" REAL /* Current water level in the reservoir */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "inspector" TEXT /* Name or ID of the inspector who conducted the last inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reservoirid_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monitoring_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring station */,
  "reservoirid_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reservoir where the station is located */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the monitoring station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the monitoring station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was last serviced */,
  "maintenance_due_date" TEXT /* Date when the next maintenance is due */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name or ID of the person responsible for the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monitoring_stations_reservoirid_id FOREIGN KEY ("reservoirid_id") REFERENCES reservoirs ("reservoirid_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of equipment */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the monitoring station where the equipment is located */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the equipment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the equipment (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the equipment was installed */,
  "last_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the equipment was last calibrated */,
  "calibration_due_date" TEXT /* Date when the next calibration is due */,
  "warranty_expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the equipment's warranty expires */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES monitoring_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., high pH, high turbidity) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was generated */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alert */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was resolved */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes or details about how the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., staff, engineer, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the measurement */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Exact time when the access occurred */,
  "device" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
